languages.text: {n}Техножрец выглядит мрачнее тучи.{/n} "Вольный Торговец, я в когнитивном ступоре. Я проанализировал все возможные гипотезы провала и перепроверил каждый свой шаг — и не углядел ни одной ошибки. Органические части и феррум санктум сочлись идеально, мозг находился в максимальной степени сохранности. Эти... осложнения не должны были случиться, и все же результат налицо. Мои расчеты идеально верны — это неопровержимый факт. Значит, изъян был в условиях или самих объектах?"

{n}The Tech-Priest looks gloomier than a cloud.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I am experiencing a cognitive block. I have analysed every possible failure hypothesis and double-checked every step I made — and I have failed to identify a single mistake. The organic parts and the Ferrum Sanctum joined together perfectly, the brain was perfectly preserved. These... complications should never have occurred, and yet the outcome cannot be denied. My calculations are perfectly correct — that is an incontrovertible fact. So, was the flaw in the conditions or in the subjects themselves?"
languages.original_text: {n}Техножрец выглядит мрачнее тучи.{/n} "Вольный Торговец, я в когнитивном ступоре. languages.text: {n}テクプリストは雲よりも暗く見える。{/n} 「ローグトレーダー、私は認知のブロックに陥っている。あらゆる可能性のある故障仮説を分析し、私が行った手順をすべて再確認した。そして、私は単一のミスを見つけることができなかった。有機部分とフェルム・サンクタムが完璧に結合し、脳は完璧に保存された。これらの…複雑さは決して起こるべきではない。しかし、結果を否定することはできない。私の計算は完璧に正しい。それは揺るぎない事実だ。では、問題は条件にあるのか、それとも被験者自身にあるのか？」
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest looks gloomier than a cloud.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I am experiencing a cognitive block. I have analysed every possible failure hypothesis and double-checked every step I made — and I have failed to identify a single mistake. The organic parts and the ferrum sanctum joined together perfectly, the brain was perfectly preserved. These... complications should never have occurred, and yet the outcome cannot be denied. My calculations are perfectly correct — that is an incontrovertible fact. So, was the flaw in the conditions or in the subjects themselves?"

traits.locale_text: {n}テクプリストは雲よりも暗く見える。{n} 「ローグトレーダー、私は認知のブロックに陥っている。あらゆる可能性のある故障仮説を分析し、私が行った手順をすべて再確認した。そして、私は単一のミスを見つけることができなかった。有機部分とフェルム・サンクタムが完璧に結合し、脳は完璧に保存された。これらの…複雑さは決して起こるべきではない。しかし、結果を否定することはできない。私の計算は完璧に正しい。それは揺るぎない事実だ。では、問題は条件にあるのか、それとも被験者自身にあるのか？」

languages.text: {n}技术神甫面色阴郁。{/n}“行商浪人，我陷入了认知障碍。我分析了所有可能的失败假设，反复检查了每一步操作，但都没能找出半点瑕疵。血肉与钢铁圣所完美结合，大脑也保存完好。这些……并发症本不该出现，可事实不容否认。然而，我的计算绝对正确——这同样也是不容置疑的事实。所以，缺陷究竟出在哪里？实验环境，还是受试体本身？”
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest looks gloomier than a cloud.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I am experiencing a cognitive block. I have analysed every possible failure hypothesis and double-checked every step I made — and I have failed to identify a single mistake. The organic parts and the Ferrum Sanctum joined together perfectly, the brain was perfectly preserved. These... complications should never have occurred, and yet the outcome cannot be denied. My calculations are perfectly correct — that is an incontrovertible fact. So, was the flaw in the conditions or in the subjects themselves?"

traits.locale_text: {n}技术神甫面色阴郁。{/n}“行商浪人，我陷入了认知障碍。我分析了所有可能的失败假设，反复检查了每一步操作，但都没能找出半点瑕疵。血肉与钢铁圣所完美结合，大脑也保存完好。这些……并发症本不该出现，可事实不容否认。然而，我的计算绝对正确——这同样也是不容置疑的事实。所以，缺陷究竟出在哪里？实验环境，还是受试体本身？”

languages.text: {n}Le visage du technoprêtre est plus sombre qu'un nuage d'orage.{/n} « {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, je suis en situation de blocage cognitif. J'ai analysé tous les scénarios d'échecs potentiels et soigneusement vérifié chacune des étapes de l'opération, mais je n'ai pas réussi à découvrir la moindre erreur dans la procédure. L'union de la chair et du Ferrum Sanctum a été réalisée à la perfection, de même que la préservation du cerveau. Mes calculs étant parfaitement et indéniablement corrects, ces... complications n'ont pas lieu d'être. Pourtant, le résultat est là. Alors, la faille réside-t-elle dans les conditions de l'expérience ou dans les sujets eux-mêmes ? »
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest looks gloomier than a cloud.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I am experiencing a cognitive block. I have analysed every possible failure hypothesis and double-checked every step I made — and I have failed to identify a single mistake. The organic parts and the Ferrum Sanctum joined together perfectly, the brain was perfectly preserved. These... complications should never have occurred, and yet the outcome cannot be denied. My calculations are perfectly correct — that is an incontrovertible fact. So, was the flaw in the conditions or in the subjects themselves?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Le visage du technoprêtre est plus sombre qu'un nuage d'orage.{/n} « {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, je suis en situation de blocage cognitif. J'ai analysé tous les scénarios d'échecs potentiels et soigneusement vérifié chacune des étapes de l'opération, mais je n'ai pas réussi à découvrir la moindre erreur dans la procédure. Mes calculs étant parfaitement et indéniablement corrects, ces... complications n'ont pas lieu d'être. Pourtant, le résultat est là. Alors, la faille réside-t-elle dans les conditions de l'expérience ou dans les sujets eux-mêmes ? »

languages.text: {n}El tecnosacerdote está sombrío como una nube de tormenta.{/n} «Comerciante Independiente, sufro de un bloqueo cognitivo. He analizado toda hipótesis posible de fracaso y he comprobado cada paso que he tomado. No he podido identificar ni un solo error. Las partes orgánicas y el ferrum sanctum se combinaron a la perfección, el cerebro estaba perfectamente conservado. Estas... complicaciones nunca se deberían haber producido, pero el resultado es innegable. Mis cálculos son exactos; eso es un hecho incuestionable. Siendo así, ¿estaba el error en las condiciones o en los propios sujetos?».
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest looks gloomier than a cloud.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I am experiencing a cognitive block. I have analysed every possible failure hypothesis and double-checked every step I made — and I have failed to identify a single mistake. My calculations are perfectly correct — that is an incontrovertible fact. So, was the flaw in the conditions or in the subjects themselves?"

languages.text: {n}Tekno Rahip, bulutlardan bile kasvetli görünüyor.{/n} "Hür Tacir, bilişsel bir tıkanıklık yaşıyorum. Olası her başarısızlık hipotezini analiz ettim ve attığım her adımı iki kez kontrol ettim... Tek bir hata bile bulamadım. Organik parçalar ve demir kutak, birbirine mükemmel bir şekilde bağlandı. Beyin mükemmel bir şekilde korundu. Bu... Komplikasyonlar asla ortaya çıkmamalıydı fakat sonuç inkâr edilemez. Hesaplamalarım tamamen doğru, bu tartışılmaz bir gerçek. Öyleyse kusur koşullarda mı yoksa deneklerin kendilerinde mi?"
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest looks gloomier than a cloud.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I am experiencing a cognitive block. I have analysed every possible failure hypothesis and double-checked every step I made — and I have failed to identify a single mistake. The organic parts and the Ferrum Sanctum joined together perfectly, the brain was perfectly preserved. These... complications should never have occurred, and yet the outcome cannot be denied. My calculations are perfectly correct — that is an incontrovertible fact. So, was the flaw in the conditions or in the subjects themselves?"

Öyleyse kusur koşullarda mı yoksa deneklerin kendilerinde mi?"

languages.text: {n}Der Blick des Techpriesters ist düsterer als eine Wolke.{/n} "{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, ich habe eine kognitive Blockade. Ich habe alle möglichen Fehlerhypothesen analysiert und alle meine Schritte zweifach geprüft ... konnte jedoch keinen einzigen Fehler identifizieren. Die organischen Teile haben sich optimal mit dem Ferrum sanctum verbunden und das Gehirn wurde perfekt erhalten. Diese ... Komplikationen hätten niemals auftreten dürfen, lassen sich allerdings nicht bestreiten. Meine Berechnungen sind absolut korrekt ... das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache. Waren also die Bedingungen oder die Subjekte selbst fehlerhaft?"
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest looks gloomier than a cloud.{/n} "Rogue Trader, I am experiencing a cognitive block. I have analysed every possible failure hypothesis and double-checked every step I made — and I have failed to identify a single mistake.
